name: GIGABYTE B860 DS3H WIFI6E ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9066(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 4x PCIe 4.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 2.1 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B860 DS3H WIFI6E ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Full-size ATX LGA 1851 motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5-9066, and Wi-Fi 6E for value Intel 860 systems.
